div.div:
«requirement»
Hazard Detectionid: REQ-EHR-10
text: The system shall detect sudden roadway hazards including obstacles, pedestrians, disabled vehicles, accident scenes, unexpected traffic stops, and emergency braking by the lead truck.

div.div:
«hazard examples»
Emergency Events Covered• Sudden obstacle on road
• Pedestrian entering roadway
• Disabled vehicle ahead
• Accident scene
• Unexpected traffic stop
• Emergency braking by lead truck

«supporting ADAS»
Systems Used• Automatic Emergency Braking (AEB)
• Forward Collision Warning (FCW)
• Distance Monitoring
• Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC)
• Radar / LiDAR / Camera obstacle detection

switch.text: Requirements Diagram — Truck Platooning Emergency Hazard Response

div.div:
«requirement»
Emergency Hazard Responseid: REQ-EHR-00
text: The platoon shall react safely and in a coordinated manner to sudden hazards or emergency braking events to prevent collisions between vehicles.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1008px; margin-left: 26px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Arial; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
«requirement»
Emergency Response Goalid: REQ-EHR-01
text: The platoon shall protect all vehicles from collision during sudden obstacle, pedestrian, disabled-vehicle, accident-scene, unexpected-stop, or lead-truck emergency braking events.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 510px; margin-left: 1748px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Arial; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
«requirement»
Success Conditionid: REQ-EHR-02
text: All platoon vehicles shall respond rapidly and consistently, maintain safe separation distances, and avoid collisions while coming to a controlled stop or avoiding the hazard.

div.div:
«requirement»
Collision Risk Assessmentid: REQ-EHR-20
text: The system shall evaluate collision risk using relative distance, relative speed, deceleration, time-to-collision, and current platoon status.

div.div:
«requirement»
Emergency Brake Activationid: REQ-EHR-30
text: The vehicle shall activate emergency braking when collision risk exceeds the defined safety threshold.

div.div:
«requirement»
Emergency Brake Communicationid: REQ-EHR-40
text: The detecting vehicle shall transmit a hazard alert and emergency brake command to following platoon vehicles without unnecessary delay.

«requirement»
Coordinated Platoon Responseid: REQ-EHR-50
text: Each platoon vehicle shall receive, validate, and propagate the emergency brake command through the platoon.

«requirement»
Safe Stop / Hazard Avoidanceid: REQ-EHR-80
text: The platoon shall either come to a controlled safe stop or perform hazard avoidance when stopping alone is insufficient.

Platoon Status Updateid: REQ-EHR-90
text: The system shall update and share platoon status, deceleration state, and vehicle response state during and after the emergency event.
